summary: Completed comprehensive testing of file attachments feature for courses and lessons. All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed including expandable lessons, file upload/download, lesson creation, and RBAC visibility controls.
critical_code_review_comments: File upload endpoint correctly validates file types (PDF, DOC, DOCX, PPT, PPTX, XLS, XLSX, TXT, JPG, PNG, GIF)
Download endpoint is PUBLIC (no auth required) - correct for <a href> download links
Delete endpoint correctly checks ownership (403 for non-owners)
CourseDetailPage correctly shows/hides instructor-only buttons based on role
Expandable lesson cards work correctly with content and materials sections
File type icons (FilePdf, FileDoc, FilePpt, FileXls, FileImage) mapped correctly by MIME type
Paperclip icon with file count shows on lesson cards that have attachments
Add Lesson form has proper data-testid attributes for all fields
apiUpload function correctly handles FormData for multipart uploads

test_credentials.test_users_created: UI_TEST_ prefixed users created in MongoDB, cleaned up after tests

seed_data_creation: Test users (faculty, student), course, lessons, and files created with UI_TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: File attachments feature fully tested. Backend: POST /api/files/upload (auth required), GET /api/files?course_id/lesson_id (auth required), GET /api/files/{id}/download (PUBLIC), DELETE /api/files/{id} (owner only). Frontend: CourseDetailPage shows expandable lessons with content and Materials section. Instructor sees 'Add Lesson' and 'Attach File' buttons. Students see Materials but no upload/delete buttons. Files display with type icons, filename, size, and download/delete buttons on hover.

frontend: Course detail page loads with data-testid='course-detail-page' - PASSED
Course title displays correctly - PASSED
Add Lesson button visible for instructor - PASSED
Add Lesson button NOT visible for student - PASSED
Lesson cards are expandable with caret icons - PASSED
Expanded lesson shows content text - PASSED
Expanded lesson shows Materials section - PASSED
Attach File button visible for instructor in expanded lesson - PASSED
Attach File button NOT visible for student in expanded lesson - PASSED
Hidden file input exists with data-testid='file-upload-input' - PASSED
Add Lesson form shows title, description, content fields - PASSED
Create Lesson button submits form and adds new lesson - PASSED
Uploaded file shows with type icon, filename, size - PASSED
Download button visible on file hover - PASSED
Delete button visible for instructor on file hover - PASSED
Paperclip icon with count shows on lesson cards with files - PASSED
Materials count updates after file upload - PASSED
Enroll button visible for students - PASSED
Progress bar shows after enrollment - PASSED
Enrolled Students section visible for instructor - PASSED
